Super Intelligence Safety
A Book by Manjunath Kalburgi

Super Intelligence Safety Experts

The Complete Guide to AI Safety and Alignment

A comprehensive guide covering AI safety fundamentals, alignment research, interpretability, evaluation, governance, and the future of keeping AI systems safe and beneficial.

Start Reading

Table of Contents

Part 1Foundations of AI Safety

01

AI Safety Fundamentals

Core concepts and principles of AI safety, including risk categories, the alignment problem, and why safety matters for advanced AI systems.

02

Alignment Research

Deep dive into alignment research approaches, including value alignment, reward modeling, constitutional AI, and scalable oversight.

03

Interpretability

Understanding how neural networks work internally, mechanistic interpretability, feature visualization, and transparency techniques.

Part 2Safety in Practice

04

Evaluation and Benchmarking

Methods and frameworks for evaluating AI safety, red teaming, benchmarks, and safety testing methodologies.

05

Technical Safety

Technical approaches to AI safety including robustness, adversarial testing, containment, and monitoring systems.

06

Governance and Policy

AI governance frameworks, international policy, regulation, standards, and institutional approaches to managing AI risks.

Part 3Building a Career in Safety

07

Organizations and Research

Key AI safety organizations, research labs, funding landscape, and the current state of the safety research ecosystem.

08

Practical Implementation

Hands-on guidance for implementing AI safety practices, building safety teams, and integrating safety into product development.

Part 4The Future of Safety

09

Emerging Risks

New and emerging AI safety risks including autonomous agents, multimodal models, open-source challenges, and unforeseen capabilities.

10

Future of AI Safety

The road ahead for AI safety research, long-term visions, superintelligence considerations, and building a safe AI future.
